articles.title: Yesterday CSK vs MI, IPL 2026 match result: What happened in Chennai Super Kings vs Mumbai Indians clash?
articles.summary: Chennai Super Kings defeated Mumbai Indians by eight wickets in an IPL 2026 match at MA Chidambaram Stadium, with Ruturaj Gaikwad named Player of the Match for his unbeaten 67.

articles.title: Para-legal volunteers to aid in missing children cases in Tamil Nadu
articles.summary: Tamil Nadu's State government will deploy para-legal volunteers in police stations to assist in the 8,000 annual missing children cases, providing support to families and children.

articles.title: Chennai residents, take cleanliness survey seriously now
articles.summary: Chennai residents are urged to participate in the 10th Swachh Survekshan cleanliness survey, as their feedback will determine the city's ranking among other cities.

articles.title: TVK chief Vijay cancells Velankanni trip
articles.summary: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam chief Vijay cancelled his planned visit to Velankanni Church in Nagapattinam district, disappointing thousands of fans, citing personal reasons.

articles.title: Hotels may shut': DMK's TKS Elangovan slams LPG price hike, says centre acted after elections to burden public
articles.summary: DMK spokesperson TKS Elangovan criticized the central government's hike in commercial LPG prices, stating it burdens the public.
